value.:highlights: [{"icon":"lucide:zap","label":"Velocity: scaffold apps or layers in minutes with CLI handoffs."},{"icon":"lucide:square-stack","label":"Reliability: shared layers keep auth, data, and content patterns consistent."},{"icon":"lucide:refresh-ccw","label":"Automation: workspace docs + CouchDB seeding stay in sync every run."}]
value.:pillars: [{"eyebrow":"Stack","title":"Nuxt 4 + CouchDB","description":"Vue 3, Tailwind, Pinia, ImageKit, and CouchDB replication are preconfigured so every app inherits the same runtime guarantees."},{"eyebrow":"Workspace","title":"/apps · /layers · /docs","description":"Keep product code, reusable layers, and living documentation aligned with a single repository."},{"eyebrow":"Automation","title":"CLI handoffs","description":"The couchfusion CLI seeds CouchDB, writes module setup files, and validates prerequisites every time you scaffold."}]
value.description: CouchFusion unifies Nuxt 4, Bun, and CouchDB into a batteries-included platform so teams can ship offline-ready products without reinventing auth, content, or analytics.
value.highlightText: Stack + workspace + automation = the fastest path from idea to production.
value.quickStartCommand:
git clone couchfusion && cd nuxt-apps
couchfusion init --path ./workspace --layers-branch main
couchfusion create_app --name couchfusioncom --modules analytics,auth,content,imagekit
value.quickStartHint: Clone the workspace, extend the layers listed in docs/module_setup.json, and let CouchDB seeding give you live pages instantly.
value.title: One workspace, shared layers, instant CouchDB + Nuxt apps

value.:features: [{"title":"Realtime Sync","description":"Use CouchDB replication to keep clients, devices, and services in sync without writing custom APIs.","icon":"lucide:refresh-cw"},{"title":"Composable Content","description":"Publish pages, layouts, and components from a visual content workbench with live preview.","icon":"lucide:component"},{"title":"Secure Auth","description":"Authenticate users with the shared auth layer and session middleware, ready for production.","icon":"lucide:shield-check"}]
value.description: CouchFusion delivers CouchDB-backed data workflows, server-rendered Nuxt experiences, and a streamlined content system out of the box.
value.heading: Everything you need to ship production apps

value.description: CouchFusion unifies your backend and frontend so teams can launch ideas quickly. CouchDB handles persistence and sync, while Nuxt delivers performant UI with server rendering and islands where you need them.
value.heading: CouchDB data, Nuxt rendering, one cohesive system
value.pointFour: Customize every layer while keeping a consistent DX
value.pointOne: Provision CouchDB databases per tenant or project automatically
value.pointThree: Ship offline-ready experiences with PouchDB-compatible sync
value.pointTwo: Use Nuxt server routes to bridge content, orders, and auth flows

value.command: couchfusion init --path ./workspace --layers-branch main\ncouchfusion create_app --name couchfusioncom --modules analytics,auth,content,imagekit
value.description: Install the couchfusion CLI, point it at your workspace, and seed minimark documents to go live with a production-ready stack.
value.heading: Bootstrap, configure, and publish in minutes

value.description: Move from fundamentals to advanced patterns with a project-based curriculum that pairs Vue best practices with CouchDB expertise.
value.heading: Learn CouchFusion with a guided course
value.moduleOneDescription: Understand reactivity, components, and composition API essentials.
value.moduleThreeDescription: Connect auth, content, and payments to build a launch-ready experience.
value.moduleTwoDescription: Configure databases, replication, and security for CouchFusion projects.

value.description: Join developers building the future of CouchDB-powered apps. Contribute to layers, share templates, and help shape the roadmap.
value.heading: Be part of the CouchFusion community

value.description: Test our payments infrastructure for the fastest and cheapest money transfers.

seo.description: CouchFusion combines CouchDB sync, Nuxt full-stack rendering, and a visual content layer so teams can launch offline-ready apps fast.
seo.title: CouchFusion — Build CouchDB-powered Nuxt apps
